title: Beehiiv vs Privy (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Beehiiv vs Privy: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Beehiiv and Privy comes down to your specific use case. Beehiiv is built for newsletter publishers and media operators, while Privy targets Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

comparison_table.tool_b: Shopify Stores Wanting Email, Sms, And Popups In One Tool

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on newsletter publishers and media operators
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Beehiiv wins for newsletter publishers and media operators, while Privy is stronger for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Privy?
faq.a: Privy starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Privy to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
